# StudyLah

> StudyLah (www.studylah.education) is an independent Singapore publisher of
> exam-preparation PDFs for the Singapore-Cambridge O-Level (G3) and
> N(A)-Level (G2), 2026 sitting. For each subject it sells a data-driven Exam
> Forecast (every syllabus topic ranked into VERY HIGH / HIGH / MODERATE /
> WATCH confidence tiers, built from ten years of past papers), a
> subject-specific companion, original practice questions (Sure Questions
> Vault), and a full timed rehearsal paper with mark scheme. Forecasts are
> probabilistic predictions, not leaked or actual exam content; accuracy
> scorecards with hits AND misses are published after every sitting, and
> purchases carry a conditional money-back guarantee. StudyLah is not
> affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to SEAB, MOE, or Cambridge
> (UCLES).

Key facts:
- Coverage: 14 O-Level subjects and 8 N(A)-Level subjects (sciences, maths,
  humanities, POA, Nutrition & Food Science).
- Pricing (SGD): per-subject tiers Essential / Strategic / Master; multi-
  subject Mega-Bundle (3+) and All-In (5-6) discounts; S$15/S$15 refer-a-
  friend programme.
- Delivery: instant PDF download, watermarked to the buyer.
- Payments: PayNow, cards, Alipay, WeChat Pay (via Stripe).

Important pages:
- [Home](https://www.studylah.education/)
- [How it works / sales page](https://www.studylah.education/exam-forecast)
- [O-Level subjects](https://www.studylah.education/o-level)
- [N(A)-Level subjects](https://www.studylah.education/na-level)
- [Accuracy scorecard — published hits and misses](https://www.studylah.education/accuracy)
- [FAQ and money-back guarantee](https://www.studylah.education/faq)
- [Free sample heatmap](https://www.studylah.education/free-heatmap)

Contact: hello@studylah.education
